title: Unify Log Entry
description: A structured log entry in the Unify platform, used to record LLM calls, agent interactions, and arbitrary key-value telemetry within a project and optional context.

id.description: Unique log entry identifier assigned by the platform

ts.description: Timestamp of when the log entry was created

project.description: Name of the project this log belongs to

context.description: Optional context path within the project (e.g. 'eval/run-42')

entries.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs recorded in this log entry (e.g. prompt, response, model, latency_ms, cost)
